title: Party Banter
opening: Hey there! What a turnout, huh? How are you finding the vibe tonight?

t1.prompt: Hey there! What a turnout, huh? How are you finding the vibe tonight?
t1.promptTranslation: Hey there! What a turnout, huh? — Hey there! What a big crowd, right? How are you experiencing the atmosphere tonight?

t2.prompt: Glad to hear it! Yeah, it's really buzzing, isn't it? Have you managed to mingle much, or have you been anchored to the snack table like I have?
t2.promptTranslation: Glad to hear it! Yeah, it's really buzzing, isn't it? — I'm pleased to hear that! Yes, it's very lively, isn't it? Have you socialized a lot, or have you stayed by the snack table like I have?

t3.prompt: I hear you. Sometimes these events can be a bit hit-or-miss. Are you just here for a quick appearance, or hoping to make the best of it?
t3.promptTranslation: I hear you. Sometimes these events can be a bit hit-or-miss. — I understand. Occasionally these gatherings can be either very good or very bad. Are you only here for a short visit, or are you trying to enjoy it as much as possible?

t4.prompt: Oh, really? Anyone particularly intriguing you've stumbled upon? I'm always looking for a good yarn. What typically sparks your interest at these shindigs?
t4.promptTranslation: Oh, really? Anyone particularly intriguing you've stumbled upon? I'm always looking for a good yarn. — Oh, really? Have you met anyone especially fascinating? I'm always keen for an interesting story. What usually captures your attention at these parties?

t5.prompt: Can't blame you, the spread looks quite inviting! What's your go-to at these events – do you dive straight for the savoury, or are you a sweet tooth like me?
t5.promptTranslation: Can't blame you, the spread looks quite inviting! — I don't fault you, the array of food looks very appealing! What's your usual preference at these events – do you head directly for the salty or spicy foods, or do you prefer sweets like I do?

t6.prompt: Fair enough, sometimes it's about making your own fun. What's usually on your radar – any exciting projects, hobbies, or travel plans you're keen to chat about?
t6.promptTranslation: Fair enough, sometimes it's about making your own fun. — That's reasonable, sometimes you have to create your own enjoyment. What's usually on your mind – any exciting projects, hobbies, or upcoming trips you're eager to discuss?

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you rephrase it, perhaps?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you rephrase it, perhaps?

t-end.prompt: It was great chatting with you! Enjoy the rest of the evening, and hopefully, we'll cross paths again soon. Cheers!
t-end.promptTranslation: It was great chatting with you! Enjoy the rest of the evening, and hopefully, we'll cross paths again soon. Cheers!
